responseMessageContents.title: Switched to real payment tracking and enhanced account security.
responseMessageContents.description: We have removed all demo and test labels to support real investment records. The system now requires a verified account for all payment-related actions and ensures that investment requests from the main website are securely synchronized with the app for the owner to review.
